regional_cost_note: Carpet layers in New Plymouth typically charge $25–$40/m² installed. Coastal Taranaki conditions mean wool and moisture-resistant synthetic carpets are popular choices for residential installs.

businesses.name: Brentley Carpet Layers
businesses.known_for: Carpet layer specialising in floor preparation, supply and installation at competitive prices; services New Plymouth and South Taranaki.

businesses.name: Oncore
businesses.known_for: New Plymouth-based maintenance and repair specialist offering residential and commercial carpet laying and flooring services.
